title: Golden Grilled Turkish Prawns Iskender
description: Rich and crumbly Turkish dish featuring prawns, served in an Iskender style, cooked to perfection on a robata grill. This satvik-friendly dish is a must try for seafood lovers.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium high heat.
In a bowl, mix together melted butter, garlic, and lemon juice.
Add the prawns to the bowl and toss to coat with the butter mixture.
Grill the prawns for 2-3 minutes per side, or until pink and cooked through.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it on the grill for a minute.
Assemble the Iskender by placing a few prawns on each slice of pita bread.
Spoon some tomato sauce and yogurt over the prawns.
Sprinkle parsley over the top and serve immediately.
